description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house featuring a flat roof with a rooftop terrace, outdoor seating, and planters. The facade combines white plaster with wood panel accents and large glass windows, providing a sleek and contemporary appearance. The house includes multiple balconies with greenery, and the main living areas are oriented toward the front, maximizing natural light. The rear and side elevations are more minimal, with fewer windows and a focus on privacy. The structure is set on a small plot with landscaped grass areas and paved walkways. Architectural details such as clean lines, open terraces, and integrated planters emphasize a modern urban lifestyle.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, wood accents, and multiple balconies with greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with large windows, wood paneling, two balconies with planters, and the rooftop terrace with outdoor furniture.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a mostly solid white wall with minimal windows and a row of planters on the rooftop edge.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the rooftop terrace, stair access, and a more private elevation with fewer windows and some greenery.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the side and partial front, with visible balconies, rooftop terrace, and landscaped ground area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door with minimal steps, integrated into the facade with no porch or overhang, emphasizing clean lines and modern aesthetics.
